name: Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crust and set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F.
3. Wash and scrub the potatoes. Place them in a baking pan and brush the skins with olive oil.
4. Bake for 1 1/2 hours until very soft. Cool, then peel.
5. Mash the potatoes and add the remaining ingredients. Blend until the mixture has a creamy consistency.
6. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F.
7. Spoon the mixture into the pie crust. Garnish with walnuts.
8. Bake for 1 hour.
9. Chill or cool to room temperature before serving.
Variation: Add 1-2 cups of cooked chickpeas to the sweet potato mash before cooking the pie. Ensure they are well mashed.
